feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: app for loading materials while respecting clean core principles
entry.content:
I want to create an application that loads materials in Excel format and inserts the data according to the standard. Previously, I would have used a BAPI, but from what I understand, this wouldn't be compatible with the SAP core. What would be the correct approach: RAP -> SAP API? Considering that using only RAP could cause time limit issues for very large volumes?

S4 -> ON-PREMISE 2021

entry.title: Is PO Creation via RAP (EML) using I_PURCHASEORDERTP_2 Possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, is it possible to create Purchase Orders through a RAP application using EML by consuming the standard business object interface I_PURCHASEORDERTP_2, based on data received from an external system (e.g., via Excel upload)?

Please let me know if this approach is supported or not.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: abap service instance unavailable
entry.content: PLease help me , I am getting is error on opening up the dashboard of my abap service instance , its a standard version and i have alot of applications connected to it and all have gone down .

entry.title: Use of Custom CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE Not Permitted in Development System
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use a custom business object created via the Custom Business Object and Custom CDS View Fiori apps. A table has been generated, and I am attempting to use the corresponding CDS entity YY1_PURCHASE in my development (RAP) scenario.

However, I am getting the error:
“The use of CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE is not permitted.”

Is it possible to use such custom CDS entities created via key user tools in RAP development? Or is there any restriction in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Please let me know if this is supported or not.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown in my system. Our eclipse version is Version: 2022-06 (4.24.0). Why Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown?

 

Advance Thanks

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Trial: Service Definition and Binding Not Working newly Created Package
entry.content:
Hi SAP RAP Champion,

my package under ZLOCAL 



I attempted to create a Service Definition and Service Binding in the package ZFE_ATS_PR. However, when I preview the service binding, it displays a blank screen.

 

I created a similar Service Definition and Service Binding using the same CDS root entity (without creating a new CDS root) in another package, ZFE_TRAVEL_000405, which was generated by the class ZDMO_CL_FE_TRAVEL_GENERATOR(https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-rap-prepare-service..html), and it works as expected.

Additionally, when I run the newly created artifacts (Service Definition → Service Binding) in the package created by the autogenerated class, they work correctly. I also tried previewing the service binding from another user’s package, and it works fine there as well.

To troubleshoot further, I deleted my ABAP Cloud Trial cockpit account and recreated it, but the issue still persists. am missing any configuration, authorization, or package-related setting?

Your valuable suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,
Pradhan

entry.title: Unable to get file picker in pop-up of RAP application
entry.content:
I want my pop-up to be able to pick a file from my desktop but I am not getting the option to do it.
Below is how the popup looks now, when I click upload excel it does go to my method in debugger.
So I think I am on right path.


I am using abstract entity to do this because I really do not want to add a field to my table which would hold the excel file.

@EndUserText.label: 'Upload Excel'
define abstract entity Z_S_ExcelUpload
{     
  @Semantics.largeObject: { 
      mimeType: 'MimeType', 
      contentDispositionPreference: #ATTACHMENT
  }
  @EndUserText.label: 'Excel File'     
  attachment : abap.rawstring;
  
  .hidden: true
  @Semantics.mimeType: true
  mimetype   : abap.char(128);
}

what am I doing wrong, how can I make it pick an excel file from my desktop?
Is this because I am using OData V2 – UI instead of V4?
Thanks.

entry.title: Custom Batch Number Creation for Process Order in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Strictly in Public Cloud - I have a requirement where custom batch number needs to be assigned in Process Order creation screen for Co - Product, By product and for Order Material.

Is it possible to assign the Batch code by suppressing the internal N/R with the criteria maintained in Z table. For example,  i maintain for material POLYMER as "PL" in z table. And my batch code is assigned as PL0426 (04 is current month & 26 is current year).

I need clarification whether this modification can be done using BADI at COR1 - Create process order, COR2 - Change Process Order, COR6N - Confirmation Order, MIGO - Post Goods movement.

If anyone had done this enhancement, please drop a reply.

Thanks & Regards,

Pranay Teja K.

entry.title: Display Hierarchy in SAP RAP
entry.content:
ABAP Development  ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  #ABAPCloud

We are trying to create a UI app with

1. WBS hierarchy tree on first page.

2. On click of a selected WBS it would go to another page which has financial details in form of single table having multiple tab views.

Can anyone please help with any of these requirements? How can we use analytical cube and query to achieve this?

entry.title: R_SalesOrderTP extensibility
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and we have extended the behavior of Manage Sales Order (Version 2) (BDEF: R_SalesOrderTP) to add a determination. However, adding a determination is not allowed as an extension in R_SalesOrderTP.

We also explored using event-based local consumption, but we are not allowed to modify the Sales Order entity in that context.

The requirement is to automatically set a Delivery Block when certain standard fields are changed.

Given these limitations, is there an alternative approach to achieve this requirement?

Thank you

entry.title: How to access custom VBAK fields in BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE?
entry.content:
I created custom VBAK fields in Custom Fields app. Now, I'm trying to access it on BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE to manipulate its values.
Is this possible?

Is it not present in BAPE_VBAK.

entry.title: Which system supports CL_CTS_API?
entry.content:
Hello Support Team,

I'd like to use CL_CTS_API. I tested the following systems, but they do not appear to support CL_CTS_API:

SAP S/4HANA 2025, Fully-Activated Appliance
SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, Fully-Activated Appliance
Could you please advise which SAP system/release (e.g., S/4HANA on-prem release, SAP_BASIS level, or ABAP Platform version) I should use to access CL_CTS_API?

If possible, please also share:

- the minimum release/SP level where CL_CTS_API is available, and
- whether it requires a specific CTS/Transport setup (e.g., CTS+ / TMS configuration).
Thank you,
Devon

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Cannot Transport Existing Custom Field Changes
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I’m facing an issue while transporting a custom field from the Dev tenant to the QA tenant in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (release 2602).

I went through multiple blogs and found that the recommended approach is to use the Export Software Collection app. I do have access to the app, but I’m unable to see the field I modified.

In my case, the field already existed I only changed its length and republished it. However, this change is not appearing in the software collection, so I’m unable to transport it.

 

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or can suggest what might be missing here?

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: ADT Keyword Highlights Are (STILL) Broken
entry.content:
Hello all,

my previous post from Apr 01 2025 discussed the absolutely broken syntax highlighting in ADT.

Since then, there were zero improvements and highlights still remain broken.

As you can see in the screenshot below, the keyword "LOCK" is not colored correctly, while every other keyword is.

This happens to MANY keywords, as if ABAP was extended, but not the highlighter. Also sometimes, keywords change color when the cursor position changes, but then changes back once you use the scroll wheel to refresh the view without changing the position of the cursor. In my previous post are more examples.

In all honestly, this is unacceptable, as if the developers who develop ADT either don't use it or are not human all together.

entry.title: How to update Virtual Element field in list report from action button c
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a custom Fiori application , in Projection view there is a virtual element added which is a qty field . The requirment is to update the virtual field for the selected records in the fiori application on a button click through RAP action.The qty field should be calculated for user on click and show the value temporarily in the new virtual column in the list report. Kindly guide on how this can be achieved ,in ABAP class of the virtual field the global variables set inside the behaviour class is not available or getting cleared.

Regards

Niranjan

entry.title: Charts / KPI Visualization with RAP Custom Entities
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently working on a RAP application using custom entities, where both entities are implemented through the same ABAP class. The association between these entities is working as expected, and I have successfully handled filtering and paging as well.

At the moment, I can display the List Report, Object Page, and Line Item Reference navigation without any issues.

However, I would now like to enhance the main page by adding visualizations such as charts or KPI-style data representations based on the aggregated data.

I have explored several resources, but I haven’t been able to find a clear or reliable approach for achieving chart/KPI visualization directly using custom entities in RAP.

Is there any supported way or recommended approach to implement such visualizations in this scenario?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: BTP Trial Account-Unable to login to ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse ADT
entry.content:
Hi All, I am unable to login in to ABAP Cloud Project from Eclipse ADT. This was working last week. 

I am able to login to BTP Cockpit and I still have 20 days left for my trial account. 
In Eclipse-Click on Cloud Project-Open Logon Page in Browser-logged in with email ID and password-It is asking oAuth credentials.

I am facing this issue for the past 4 days. Anyone facing this issue?

entry.title: issue while updating pricing conditions for NBIC Purchase Orders using API_PURCHASEORDER_2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while updating pricing conditions for NBIC Purchase Orders using API_PURCHASEORDER_2 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Scenario:

* PO Type: NBIC
* API: API_PURCHASEORDER_2
* Entity: PurOrderItemPricingElement
* Condition Type: PMP0

I am able to successfully PATCH the pricing condition using Postman and receive HTTP 200 OK response, but the value is not actually updated in the database. After re-reading the pricing element, the old value is restored automatically.

PATCH URL:

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurOrderItemPricingElement(
PurchaseOrder='4500000450',
PurchaseOrderItem='00010',
PricingDocument='1000000667',
PricingDocumentItem='000010',
PricingProcedureStep='060',
PricingProcedureCounter='001'
)

Payload:

{
"ConditionRateAmount": 159.000000000,
"ConditionCurrency": "AED",
"ConditionIsManuallyChanged": true
}

Response:

* HTTP 200 OK
* No API error

However, after GET:

* ConditionRateAmount still shows old value
* Pricing seems to be redetermined automatically

Observed fields from GET response:

{
"ConditionControl": "C",
"ConditionOrigin": "C",
"ConditionIsDeletable": false,
"ConditionType": "PMP0"
}

Additional findings:

1. POST on PurOrderItemPricingElement is not supported
Error:
"Creating operations are disabled for entity"

2. PATCH on PurchaseOrderItem with NetPriceAmount also returns:
"Operation is not enabled"

3. Same API update works correctly for NB Purchase Orders, but not for NBIC.

My questions:

1. Is pricing condition update intentionally restricted for NBIC Purchase Orders in Public Cloud?
2. Are PMP0/intercompany conditions protected from API persistence?
3. Is there any supported approach to update pricing for NBIC POs through API?
4. Should pricing only be updated indirectly through condition records/info records?

Any guidance or SAP documentation reference would be appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: RSS Runtime ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for an specific information. I am testing in cloud instance on ABAP. But i want to create an automated mechanism  to handle runtime exception. I can tell that is an RSS feed to inform the Runtime error. But i want to develop something that subscribe to that particular topic of the runtime.

Do you know where i can find the RSS url of an instance to subscribe it from an external process to react to that particular event.

Thanks for your help,

Regards,

entry.title: EML Get Permission from SAP BO ( Billing )
entry.content:
Hello,

I have developed a custom app on the public cloud ( developer extensibility ).

I use the I_BILLINGDOCUMENTTP-CreateFromExternalData action (SAP Business Accelerator Hub - I_BILLINGDOCUMENTTP)
Furthermore I have set up two roles, one being able to execute the function via the Sales-Billing Document catalog (user "write"), the other being only able to create data in my app but not trigger the function above (user "read").
(Billing Document | SAP Help Portal)
If the read user performs the action, the eml fails and i can catch the error. (so far so good)
My intention now is to check if he is allowed to use the action via the global features method and disable the button if he is not.

I know that there is the GET PERMISSION ONLY GLOBAL AUTHORIZATION .... feature, but it returns true for all inputs on my end.
If I check the SAP implementation of I_BillingDocument~CreateFromExternalData, i can see, that the global authtorization method is not implemented and instead works with authorization context.
I can see there and in the business catalog for "write" (SAP_BCR_SD_BIL_DOC_PC) the required authorization objects.
Some of the authorization objects are not cloud ready and therefore cannot be used.

So my question is:
How do I check if the user can use the CreateFromExternalData action without using it in the first place?
